notes: Two new tools, reachable by click, keyboard, palette, and voice. Stash - a snippet & clipboard vault: keep a command, link, prompt, or scrap of text and copy it back in one click or by voice ('stash this', 'copy the deploy command', 'what's in my stash'); pin and search. Weekly digest - 'recap my week': a seven-day rollup (tasks, ideas, journal & mood, sessions) with a warm Claude-written reflection, on demand. Jarvis understands all of it through the same intent engine. Still free, local-only, no account, no telemetry, no new dependency.
